mappings.implementation: Azure AD Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all admin roles; per-user MFA enforcement
Azure Storage minimum TLS version policy (TLS 1.2+); App Gateway / Front Door TLS configuration; Service endpoints
mappings.rule: minimum_tls_version must not be TLS1_0 or TLS1_1

mappings.implementation: Azure Activity Log enabled; Diagnostic Settings routing to Log Analytics Workspace; Microsoft Sentinel integration
Log Analytics Workspace retention policy (minimum 90 days active + archive); immutable log storage; Azure Monitor Logs
